metadata.name: Kubernetes Namespace
metadata.description: Creates a Kubernetes Namespace with optional single label and annotation entries for basic environment scoping.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Creates a Kubernetes Namespace resource.

## Apply Order
- Create the namespace before any namespaced Deployments, Services, Secrets, or Ingress resources that depend on it.
- Use labels and annotations for ownership, environment, or platform metadata when you want lightweight organization.

## Follow-Up
- Add ResourceQuotas, LimitRanges, or NetworkPolicies separately if the namespace needs additional guardrails.

## References
- [Namespace Documentation](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/namespaces/)
